creator: joshruehlig@gmail.com
text:
Changes include..

* Updates to version 0.10.5

* Use built in github site

* Use variable substitutions where it makes sense to

* Set timestamp with REINPLACE instead of patch

* Disable upgrading and set version with flag instead of patch

* Add pkg-message

* Move the default datadirectory from /var/tmp/syncthing to /var/db/syncthing. Some systems mount /var/tmp on volitaile storage.
- I think we also need to make an entry in MOVED to inform people of this change.

* Remove "export HOME", I don't think it is necessary

* Check more specifically for missing pidfile
